zh-CN.name: 大猩猩
zh-CN.intro: 大猩猩是一种强壮的动物，住在森林里。它身上长着黑色的毛，手臂很长，走起路来慢慢地。大猩猩很温柔，喜欢吃树叶和水果。

story.title: 🦍大猩猩荡秋千
story.body: 大猩猩壮壮住在绿色的大森林里。有一天，它发现了一根长长的藤蔓，挂在大树上。壮壮用大手抓住藤蔓，试着荡来荡去。风在耳边呼呼地吹，叶子沙沙地响。一只小鸟飞过来，叽叽喳喳地说：“壮壮，你荡得真高！”壮壮开心地笑了，露出白白的牙齿。它又爬上一棵更高的树，看到远处的小河亮晶晶的。壮壮觉得，森林里的每一天都很快乐。玩累了，它坐在树杈上，摘下一片大叶子当扇子，轻轻地扇着风。慢慢地，壮壮闭上眼睛，听着树叶唱歌，舒舒服服地睡着了。

knowledge.title: 大猩猩为什么捶胸？
knowledge.body: 大猩猩用拳头捶打自己的胸口，会发出咚咚的声音。有时候，这是它在告诉别的动物：“我很强壮，不要靠近我。”有时候，大猩猩开心或者想和同伴玩，也会轻轻地捶胸。这是一种特别的说话方式。

en.name: Gorilla
en.intro: A gorilla is a strong animal that lives in the forest. It has black fur and long arms, and it walks slowly. Gorillas are gentle and like eating leaves and fruits.

story.title: 🦍Gorilla Swings on a Vine
story.body: Zhuangzhuang the gorilla lived in a big green forest. One day, he found a long vine hanging from a tall tree. Zhuangzhuang grabbed the vine with his big hands and started swinging back and forth. The wind whistled in his ears, and the leaves rustled softly. A little bird flew by and chirped, "Zhuangzhuang, you're swinging so high!" Zhuangzhuang smiled happily, showing his white teeth. Then he climbed up an even taller tree and saw a shiny little river far away. Zhuangzhuang felt so joyful in the forest. After a while, he felt tired. He sat on a branch, picked a big leaf to use as a fan, and gently fanned himself. Slowly, Zhuangzhuang closed his eyes, listened to the leaves singing, and fell into a cozy sleep.

knowledge.title: Why do gorillas beat their chests?
knowledge.body: Gorillas beat their chests with their fists, making a drumming sound. Sometimes, it means "I am strong, stay away!" Other times, a gorilla may do it gently when it is happy or wants to play. It is a special way of talking.
